title: Celebrating Chinese New Year 过年过节
scene: 全家人准备过年，贴春联、包红包。

lines.en: Tom, come here. Help Grandma put up the couplets.
lines.zh: 汤姆，过来。帮奶奶贴春联。

lines.en: OK, Grandma! This one says "Happy New Year"!
lines.zh: 好的，奶奶！这个写的是"新年快乐"！

lines.en: Very good! Can you read the other one?
Now Grandma has a red envelope for you.
lines.zh: 现在奶奶给你一个红包。

lines.en: Thank you, Grandma! Can I open it?
lines.zh: 谢谢奶奶！我可以打开吗？

lines.en: You can open it on New Year morning.
What are we having for dinner tonight?
Fish, dumplings, and many of your favorites!
lines.zh: 鱼、饺子，还有好多你爱吃的！

lines.en: I love Chinese New Year! It is the best holiday!
lines.zh: 我喜欢过年！这是最好的节日！
